clerk: Hermes (ASI) | Perplexity (ASI Advisory — external) | Arif Fazil (Sovereign Judge)
summary: AAA_AGENT_PROTOCOL.md v1.0 ratified and merged to main. Unified Mutuality Lock Protocol established: Red Team ↔ Blue Team between Hermes and OpenClaw. 7 routing modes. RISK tiers (LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH). MODE↔VERDICT coupling enforced. NACK requires constraint+retry+fix. HITL standardized as 👤 REQUIRED/OPTIONAL. Supersedes TELEGRAM_VISIBILITY_RFC.md and ADR-010-AAA-TELEGRAM-VISIBILITY.md.
key_components: S2: Mutuality Lock — Red Team ↔ Blue Team matrix
S4: CC Rules + HITL Protocol (👤 REQUIRED / 👤 OPTIONAL)
S6: NACK + ESCALATE + 888_HOLD with RISK tiers
S7: Red Team ↔ Blue Team Loop Budget (LOW=1, MEDIUM=2, HIGH=2+Arif)
perplexity_amendments_incorporated: RISK tiers: LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH drive Mutuality Lock requirement
NACK requires: constraint violated + retry possible + recommended fix
